MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-25-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul D. Singer, Esq. appeared with Josh Pebet for plaintiff Trophy Properties. Limited Scope Attorney Jerome Schweich, Esq. appeared for and with defendant Juan Montes

Settlement Conference Held. Case Settled. Parties sign off on Stipulation for Entry of Judgment as to premises located at 1855 10th Avenue, #1, San Francisco, California. Original retained by plaintiff. Trial date vacated.

Hon Frank Drago/Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Garth Sayers, Not reported. (218)
